about.title: About
about.description: FL!P - The ultimate drinking game to spice up your parties with friends!

suggest.label: Suggest a question
suggest.hint: Got an idea for a question or phrase for a game?
suggest.title: Suggest a question
suggest.placeholder: E.g. "Have you ever eaten standing up over the sink?"
suggest.successDesc: We'll read your suggestion carefully. The best questions make it into the game 🤞

drinks.title: Drinking game mode
